name: Zoji La Pass
description: A perilous, extremely scenic high mountain pass situated at an elevation of 3,528 meters. It forms the crucial link connecting the Kashmir Valley to its cold desert region, Ladakh.
history: Captured by Pakistani raiders in 1948 and later famously recaptured by the Indian Army in a daring tank assault (Operation Bison).
famousFor: Thrilling drive, snow walls, gateway to Ladakh.
